commands.repair_reason: Human maintainer review is needed to choose or land the canonical Layer 1 PR and accept the fail-closed auth-profile migration behavior; no narrow automated repair is currently identified.; Cleared: No new supply-chain or secret-permission regression was found; the diff reduces prompt-facing secret exposure and writes migrated credentials through the existing auth-profile store. commands.review_summary:
The PR strips plaintext provider `apiKey` values from generated and merged `models.json`, migrates legacy catalog-only keys into `auth-profiles.json` before writing, and adds regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. Current main can merge-preserve plaintext provider `apiKey` values into `models.json`, while the PR removes that final prompt-facing path and migrates legacy keys first.
commands.review_followup: Human maintainer review is needed to choose or land the canonical Layer 1 PR and accept the fail-closed auth-profile migration behavior; no narrow automated repair is currently identified.
